definition.procedurexml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="event_trigger" deletable="false" x="40" y="40"><field name="trigger">mod_clientload</field><next><block type="controls_if"><value name="IF0"><block type="logic_variable"><field name="variable">trash_log</field><field name="config">CUSTOM:Config</field></block></value><statement name="DO0"><block type="controls_if"><mutation else="1"></mutation><value name="IF0"><block type="math_binary_ops"><field name="OP">LT</field><value name="A"><block type="math_java_constants"><field name="CONSTANT">RANDOM</field></block></value><value name="B"><block type="math_number"><field name="NUM">0.05</field></block></value></block></value><statement name="DO0"><block type="console_log"><field name="message_type">warn</field><value name="message"><block type="text"><field name="TEXT">Hello World?</field></block></value></block></statement><statement name="ELSE"><block type="console_log"><field name="message_type">info</field><value name="message"><block type="text"><field name="TEXT">Hello World!</field></block></value></block></statement></block></statement></block></next></block></xml>
